zh.Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭音巴內-爾易斯爾 本 斯凱
zh.Stralachlan, Argyll, Scotland: 蘇格蘭阿吉爾斯特拉拉倫
zh.lifeSummary: 當Chief Donald MacKinnon於1099年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾斯凱時，他的父親Kenneth MacKinnon17歲，母親Mrs. Kenneth MacKinnon13歲。他於1126年之前與Mrs Donald MacKinnon在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1186年在他的家鄉享年87歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾斯凱。

zh-hans.Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland: 苏格兰音巴內-爾易斯爾 本 斯凱
zh-hans.Stralachlan, Argyll, Scotland: 苏格兰阿吉爾斯特拉拉倫
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Chief Donald MacKinnon于1099年出生在苏格兰音巴內-爾斯凱时，他的父亲Kenneth MacKinnon17岁，母亲Mrs. Kenneth MacKinnon13岁。他于1126年之前与Mrs Donald MacKinnon在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1186年在他的家乡享年87岁，埋葬在苏格兰音巴內-爾斯凱。

nameMeanings.name: MacKinnon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McKinnon
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhionghuin, a patronymic from a Gaelic personal name meaning ‘fair born’ or ‘fair son’ (compare Kevin ).
the name has also been ‘translated’ as Love , and has been taken as being from Gaelic Mac Ionmhuinn ‘son of the beloved one’.

nameMeanings.name: Donald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Domhnall . The final -d of the Anglicized form derives partly from misinterpretation by English speakers of the Gaelic pronunciation, and partly from association with Germanic-origin names such as Ronald . This name is strongly associated with clan Macdonald, the clan of the medieval Lords of the Isles, but is now also widely used by families with no Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Chief Donald MacKinnon was born in 1099, in Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, his father, Kenneth MacKinnon, was 17 and his mother, Mrs. Kenneth MacKinnon, was 13. He married Mrs Donald MacKinnon before 1126, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1186, in his hometown, at the age of 87, and was buried in Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Chief Donald MacKinnon est né en 1099, à Skye, Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Kenneth MacKinnon, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Kenneth MacKinnon, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Donald MacKinnon avant 1126, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1186, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 87 ans, et a été enterré à Skye, Inverness-shire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Chief Donald MacKinnon 1099 in Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Kenneth MacKinnon 17 und seine Mutter Mrs. Kenneth MacKinnon 13. Er hat vor 1126 in Argyll, Scotland Mrs Donald MacKinnon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1186 im Alter von 87 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Chief Donald MacKinnon è nato il nel 1099 nel Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, il suo padre, Kenneth MacKinnon, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Kenneth MacKinnon, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Donald MacKinnon prima del 1126, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1186, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 87 anni, e fu sepolto a Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Chief Donald MacKinnonが1099年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアスクイで生まれた時，父Kenneth MacKinnonは17歳，母Mrs. Kenneth MacKinnonは13歳であった。1126年以前にスコットランドアルグイルでMrs Donald MacKinnonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1186年に故郷で87歳で死去し，スコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアスクイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Chief Donald MacKinnon(이)가 1099년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 스카이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Kenneth MacKinnon(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Kenneth MacKinnon(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1126년 이전 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Mrs Donald MacKinnon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1186년 그의 고향에서 87세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 스카이에 묻혔다.

mn.Isle of Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland: Isle of Skye, Siorrachd Inbhir Nis, Шотланд

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Chief Donald MacKinnon nasceu em 1099, em Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, seu pai, Kenneth MacKinnon, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Kenneth MacKinnon, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Donald MacKinnon antes 1126, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1186, em sua cidade natal, com 87 anos, e foi sepultado em Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Chief Donald MacKinnon родился в 1099 г. в местности ски, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Kenneth MacKinnon было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Kenneth MacKinnon, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Donald MacKinnon перед 1126 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1186 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 87 лет и был похоронен в местности ски, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Chief Donald MacKinnon nació en 1099, en Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland, su papá, Kenneth MacKinnon, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Mrs. Kenneth MacKinnon, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Mrs Donald MacKinnon antes de 1126, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1186, en su pueblo, a la edad de 87 años, y fue sepultado en Skye, Inverness-shire, Scotland.
